TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Macky_Sall, title = Macky_Sall, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Macky_Sall} }

S.FORM: = Macky Sall = Mntucing hngkawas 1961 idas 12 jiyax 11 ka Macky Sall ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Senegal ta sayang o kiya ka Macky Sall, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 4 jiyax 2 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = maʦkj sall = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka maʦkj sall ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan sənəgal ta sajaŋ o kija ka maʦkj sall, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
S.FORM: = Macky Sall = Mntucing hngkawas 1961 idas 12 jiyax 11 ka Macky Sall ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Senegal ta sayang o kiya ka Macky Sall, pnaah hngkawas 2012 idas 4 jiyax 2 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Papak
S.PHON: = maʦkj sall = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka maʦkj sall ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan sənəgal ta sajaŋ o kija ka maʦkj sall, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. papak
